en: A: I forgot to bring my pen.
B: I’ll borrow you.
A: I forgot to bring my chopsticks.
I forgot to bring my chopsticks.

ab: ini’ saku’ aras uzi, hala ta’ mbazi.
en: B: I don’t have one either, let’s go buy one.
A: Let’s go buy a pen, shall we?
A: Let’s go buy a pen, shall we?

ab: aw, pbazi saku’ ssom uzi na’.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.

ab: aw, pbazi saku’ ssawm uzi na’.
en: B: Well, I still have to buy erasers.
A: Let’s go get breakfast, shall we?
A: Let’s go get breakfast, shall we?

ab: izyat saku’ musa’. kinnama’ saku’ ngasal la.
ch: B:我不要去，我在家吃過了。
en: B: I don’t want to go, I’ve eaten at home.
A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.

ab: zngyan maku’ hmlngaw sbil maku’ la.
en: A: I forgot to steam my lunchbox.
B: Take it to the heat!
B: Take it to the heat!
A: I forgot to pack a lunchbox.
I forgot to bring my lunchbox.

ab: nanu’ si ta’ kr’agi maniq sbil maku’ la!
ch: B:那我們一起吃我的便當吧!
en: B: Then let’s eat my lunch box together!
A: What are you having for lunch?

ch: B:我要吃學校的營養午餐。
en: B: I want a nutritious school lunch.
A: What do you want to eat for lunch?

ab: nyux saku’ maras sbil, nanu’ mglga ta’ kryax!
ch: B:我今天有帶便當，我們中午一起吃吧!
en: B: I’ve brought a lunchbox today, let’s eat together at noon!
A: Let’s go play basketball, shall we?
A: Let’s go play basketball, shall we?
B: Okay! Let’s go.
A: Shall we go play baseball?
A: Shall we go play baseball?

ab: izyat saku’ musa’, pkita’ saku’ biru’.
en: B: No, I want to study.
A: Please help me with the broom.
B: Okay, here, broomstick here.
A: Can you help me with the cloth?
A: Can you help me with the cloth?

ab: nyux saku’ kmagaw, hali magal kusa Yumin.
en: B: I’m sweeping the floor, you ask Yumin to help you.
A: Have you finished sweeping?
B: I swept it.
A: Why don’t you clean up?
B: I’ve finished cleaning up.

ab: m’uraw qu rhzyal, hali somi cikay ha.
en: A: The floor is dirty, go clean it.

ab: m’uraw qu rhzyal, hali sawmi cikay ha.
en: A: The floor is dirty, go clean it.
B: Okay, I’ll get the cloth.
B: Okay, I’ll go get the cloth for you.

ab: m’uraw qu tubung qasa, hali somi cikay ha.
ch: A+:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ab: m’uraw qu tubung qasa, hali sawmi cikay ha.
ch: A:那個窗戶很髒，去擦一下。
en: A: That window is very dirty, go clean it.

ab: ini’ na’ ha, nyux maku’ ini’ suqi kmagaw na’ qani.
ch: B:等一下，我還沒掃完這裡。
en: B: Wait a minute, I’m not done sweeping here yet.
A: What are you doing later?
B: I’m going to look for my teacher.
B: I’m going to look for my teacher.

ab: nanu’ pcyuwagun su’ i tmasuq ta’ mqwas biru’ kira’ la?
ch: A:你今天放學後要做什麼?
en: A: What are you going to do after school today?

ab: mawsa’ sami mglu mqwas ki rangi’ maku’.
en: B: I’m going to sing with my friends.

ab: nanu’ pcyuwagun nya’ i tmasuq mqwas biru’ kira?
en: A: What’s he doing after school?
B: To go swimming.
B: To go swimming.
